description: Scout the Flushing night market — note stall positions, lighting pockets, and best vantage points for after-dark shooting.
title: Scout the Flushing night market

description: Build the shot list for the Queens Night Market — vendor portraits, steam and grill action, hands plating, crowd ambiance.
title: Build shot list for Queens Night Market

description: Collect photo permission releases from vendors before shooting their stalls — track who has signed.
title: Get vendor permission releases

description: Mateo to send cover layout options and type treatment for the Night Markets book.
title: Cover design assets from Mateo

description: Reserve a fast prime (35mm f/1.4) from the rental house for low-light night market work.
title: Rent fast prime lens for low light

description: Cull and rate the Flushing night-one take; share first-pass selects with Mateo for sequencing.
title: Cull Flushing night-one selects

description: Color grade the steam-and-grill frames — keep the warm tungsten cast, control highlight clipping on the flames.
title: Color grade steam and grill frames

description: First sequencing pass for the book grid — group by market, alternate wide ambiance with tight food detail.
title: Book grid sequencing pass

description: Plan the Smorgasburg evening session — golden-hour into blue-hour, backup batteries, gimbal for the walk-throughs.
title: Plan Smorgasburg evening session

description: Research vendor and dish names for accurate captions in the book — confirm spellings with stall owners.
title: Caption research for vendor names

description: Back up all night-market takes to the field drive and the cloud archive before the next shoot.
title: Back up night takes to drive and cloud

description: Test print a few hero frames on matte vs. semi-gloss stock to pick paper for the book proof.
title: Test print on paper stock options
